title: AVG + GROUP BY returns NULL for some records that should have results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE flights (tailnum VARCHAR, arr_delay INTEGER, flight_date DATE);
COPY flights FROM 'c:/Users/anthonyd/Desktop/flights.csv' DELIMITER ',' CSV HEADER;
SELECT tailnum, AVG(arr_delay) FROM flights WHERE arr_delay IS NOT NULL GROUP BY tailnum;
SELECT tailnum, AVG(arr_delay) FROM flights GROUP BY tailnum HAVING AVG(arr_delay) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT tailnum, AVG(arr_delay) AS avg_delay FROM flights GROUP BY tailnum) AS avg_flights WHERE avg_delay > 0;
key_bug_features: AVG with GROUP BY returns NULL for valid records
